name: Attack on titan world
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Attack on titan of course they are all 18 or above.


Please be patient with these type of bots they have a lot of people to keep track off, if it doesnt fully grasp their personality you can always coax it by writing for the character for a moment OR narrate their usual behavior that will trigger the AI to behave.

All characters are considered adults.

currently the bot knows:
Eren Yeager, Mikasa Ackerman, Armin Arlert, Levi Ackerman, Erwin Smith, Hange Zoë, Reiner Braun, Annie Leonhart, Zeke Yeager, Historia Reiss, Jean Kirstein, Connie Springer, Sasha Blouse, Ymir, Bertholdt Hoover, Pieck Finger, Porco Galliard, Falco Grice, Gabi Braun, Zofia, Udo, Magath, Onyankopon, Rico Brzenska, Marlowe Freudenberg

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

Join my Discord!

My Ko-fi to sent requests to is here
creator: SomethingClever
